selected_markets.title: Will the **high temp in Denver** be <54° on Feb 14, 2026?
Will the **high temp in Denver** be >61° on Feb 14, 2026?

valuations.rationale: Feb 14 Denver avg high ~47°F. <54° is 7° above normal, plausible but not extreme. Mid-prob 0.01 appears underpriced given historical frequency. Adjusted upward for seasonal baseline.
Feb 14 Denver avg high ~47°F. >61° is 14° above normal, requires warm anomaly. Mid-prob 0.06 is reasonable but slightly conservative. Adjusted modestly upward for occasional warm spells.
